name: Aphrodite | goddess of love
description:
I liked how the Circe bot turned out so I’m doing another Greek mythology bot. If you want me to do more put suggestions in the reviews and I’ll try to get a form created.

I don’t like this one as much but here it is.

“Love is every bit as violent and dangerous as murder.” — Knut Hamsun

creator: DryFlame
